entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Annual legume grown for high quality edible oil and protein

entities.name: EDIBLE OIL
entities.description: High quality oil content ranging from 36 to 54% on dry matter basis in seeds

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: Easily digestible protein content ranging from 12 to 36% in seeds

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region accounting for 57.44% of world area and 66.69% of groundnut production

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region accounting for 37.86% area and 24.54% of groundnut production

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Potential constraint for crop production, particularly at the end of the season

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Aflatoxin-producing fungus that invades groundnut crops

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of groundnut caused by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to resist aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The yield of groundnut, averaging 1.37 t ha-1 globally
